title: potentilla × scholziana
intro: Potentilla × scholziana, also known as Scholz's cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant species within the rose family, scientifically classified as a cross between Potentilla reptans and Potentilla rupestris. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla × scholziana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and soothe skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
